name: SplitDifficulty
author: varla
description: Replaces Oblivion's single difficulty slider with independent INI multipliers: FromEnemyToPlayerDamageMult (combat damage the player takes, with a source actor), EnvironmentalDamageMult (damage the player takes with NO source actor - fall/lava/ambient), and FromPlayerToEnemyDamageMult (combat damage the player deals to enemies). Hooks Player/Character/Creature vtable[0xA9] DamageAV_F and CHAINS on top of any existing hook (capped-damage / increased-damage), computing first and passing its scaled amount down the chain. Assumes the in-game difficulty slider is centered; reads the live difficulty and warns if not.
